titleStmt.title: SII 41.328: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 328. (A.R. No. 544 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south base of the central shrine the Kariyamāṇikka Perumāḷ temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

p.hi: Rajakēsarivarman Vīra-Pāṇḍya, Śaka 1202, Year 1[5] Tulā, apara 10, Monday, and Uttiram(irregular) = 1279 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Gift of money for a lamp. Mentions Vīra-Chōḻa-chaturvēdimagalam. The temple is called Tirumēṟkōyil Chttiramēḻi Viṇṇagar Nāyanār Karumāṇikkāḻvār at Vichaiyamaṅgalam in Kuṟuppunāḍu. The sabhā of Kaṟṟāyṉkaṇṇi alias Vīrachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam received an endowment of 200 paṇam given by a Gōvindan Karumāṇikkāḻvān of Tirukkuḍandai for the lamp service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . naṉmaṅkalañciṟakka cakarayāṇṭu Āyirattirunūṟṟiraṇṭil kovirācakecari paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravat
tikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum daśamiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ kuṟuppunāṭṭu vicai
yamaṅkalattut tirumeṟkoyil nāyaṉār cittirameḻiviṇṇakar nāyaṉār karumāṇikkāḻvār koyil nampimāṟkum śrīvaiyiṣṇavarkaḷukkum viracoḻa vaḷanā
ṭṭu [ prahmadeyam] kaṟṟāyaṉ kāṇiyāṉa śrīviracoḻac caturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Upaiya sātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu tirukkuṭantaik
kovintaṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirinuntāviḷakkukku śrīpaṇṭārattil Oṭukkiṉa paṇamāy nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa paṇam2 100ippaṇam nā
ṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṟu mutal mātamoṉṟukkuk kuṟuppu nāḻiyāl muṉṉāḻi mūvuḻakke Iraṇṭaraic ceviṭu Eḷḷeṇṇaiyāka Āṇṭai
ḻi mūvuḻakku Eṇṇainampimār kaṟṟāyaṉ kāṇiyile vantu Aḷavu kaṇṭu Ilaicciṉaiyiṭṭu Āḷiṭṭu Eṭuppittuk koṭuvantu kāṭṭikkuṭuppo
kaḷukku Eṇṇai taṇṭuntaṉaiyum coṟiṭuvomākavum Ippaṭikku Eṅkaḷ makkaḷ makkaḷ cantirātittavarai Eṇṇai Aḷantu potak
paiya cātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom nāyaṉār karumāṇikkāḻvārkku viracoḻaccaturvveti maṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ippaṭikku vācciyaṉ vaṭako
yāṉ Eḻuttu
vil
nallūr
koyil
nampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku
Aṅkūr caṅ
kap perumā
ṉ tirucciṟ
ṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ E
perumakaṉ Eḻuttu [ brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu] Ippaṭikku Eḻuttu
Aṉanta nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉāṉa vikramapāṇṭiya brahmarāyaṉen
Digital edition of SII 41.328 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
